Title: Inky configurations for B2I
Notes: as per update from Inky support followed Completed a comprehensive review and validation of the INKY deployment for the Google Workspace tenant. Confirmed that license redemption, Domain-Wide Delegation, and required Google Groups were configured; verified regional setup (hosts, inbound gateway, and SMTP relay), and validated all compliance rules (Comprehensive Mail Storage, Outbound, Internal Sending/Receiving, Inbound, Google Groups, Quarantine). Performed connection and mail-flow checks, confirmed no policy conflicts, and reviewed API status and domain coverage—no missing domains detected. Message processing remains blocked only by the outstanding DNS change: updating the domain’s SPF record to include INKY. This change is currently on hold because MFA enrollment on Keith’s mobile device is pending, which is required to access the registrar/DNS management portal. Once Keith completes MFA setup and grants access, I will update the SPF record, re-run mail-flow tests, and close out the deployment.
